data.title: A Prospective, Randomized, Open-label, Active-controlled, Multicenter Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of BAY 1192631 in Japanese Patients With MRSA Infections (Skin and Soft Tissue Infection [SSTI] and SSTI-related Bacteremia)
data.brief_summary: The aim of this study is to see the efficacy and safety of BAY1192631 in Japanese patients with methicillin-resistant staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) (skin and soft tissue infections (SSTI) and SSTI-related bacteremia).
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria

* Suspected or confirmed Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) infection
* Japanese Male and female patients aged 18 years or above
* Diagnosis of Skin and soft tissue infection with MRSA either suspected or confirmed as the major cause of infection, with/without SST
endpoints: Clinical Response at Test of Cure (TOC)
Microbiological Response at Test of Cure (TOC)
